positive: A minimalist, modern, and whimsical forest scene illustration. The central subject is a stylized, large bioluminescent moth resting on a winding, abstract river rock. The surrounding elements include stylized, geometric flora (fern fronds, glowing mushrooms) and a flowing, decorative stream. The style should be a blend of linocut woodblock print and neo-tribal dot art, using crisp, solid silhouettes with high contrast. Color palette: deep indigo, emerald green, brilliant gold accents, and creamy off-white background. Composition must be perfectly centered, allowing for clean reproduction on fabric, with strong negative space defining the shapes. Vector art aesthetic, suitable for screen printing, high detail, flat shading, symmetry, clean lines, symmetrical.
